search:nextjs-auth0:next.js authenticati.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `npx create-next-app@latest my-auth-app`
  - `npm install @auth0/nextjs-auth0`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Next.js: v13.5
  - Auth0 Next.js SDK: v2.1

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `AUTH0_ISSUER_BASE_URL`: Your Auth0 domain.
  - `AUTH0_CLIENT_ID`: Client ID from your Auth0 application.
  - `AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET`: Client secret from your Auth0 application.
  - `AUTH0_AUDIENCE`: API identifier for your application.

- **Latest Version**: @auth0/nextjs-auth0 v4.22.0
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `npx create-next-app@latest my-app`
  - `npm install @auth0/nextjs-auth0`
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `AUTH0_ISSUER_BASE_URL`: Your Auth0 domain.
  - `AUTH0_CLIENT_ID`: Your Auth0 client ID.
  - `AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET`: Your Auth0 client secret.
  - `AUTH0_AUDIENCE`: The API audience for your application.

search:nextjs-auth0:auth0 integration in.content:
- Use `npx create-next-app@latest` to start a new Next.js project.
- Install the Auth0 SDK using `npm install @auth0/nextjs-auth0`.
- Configure environment variables in `.env.local`: `AUTH0_ISSUER_BASE_URL`, `AUTH0_CLIENT_ID`, `AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET`, and `AUTH0_AUDIENCE`.
- Implement authentication by wrapping your pages with the `withApiAuthRequired` higher-order component.
- For social logins, ensure you have configured them in the Auth0 dashboard under "Connections" > "Social".
- Use the `useUser` hook to access user information in functional components.
- Update Next.js router to use the new App Router for better performance and features.
- Refer to the official [Auth0 documentation](https://auth0.com/docs) for detailed setup instructions and best practices.

- **Latest Version**: @auth0/nextjs-auth0 v4.22.0
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `npx create-next-app@latest my-auth0-app`
  - `npm install @auth0/nextjs-auth0`
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `AUTH0_ISSUER_BASE_URL`: Your Auth0 domain.
  - `AUTH0_CLIENT_ID`: Your Auth0 client ID.
  - `AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET`: Your Auth0 client secret.
  - `AUTH0_AUDIENCE`: Your API audience.
